{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094528C30153C95B6DBBFF3352"}"},"total":7278},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528068821725561625","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"少见的没有雷点的书，剧情处理得很好。里面的主要角色三观很好。最喜欢的剧情是小天师的，有义气、有情怀、有故事，作者为了契合故事主题，文风都有所变化。
小许子的治愈冒险也很喜欢！气运之子的性格设计太有魅力了！各种鬼物的技能和副作用都很有意思，我印象最深刻的是用少女皮囊织成的隐形斗篷，一想到这个鬼物的来源，我就无比难过。但是无疑，它给我描绘了一个神秘莫测的惊悚游戏世界！
还有天使的那个副本！我好喜欢那位收养流浪小孩的女士！她是那么的温柔！我要被她和她的信仰迷倒了。","text_exts":[{"e":91,"s":87,"text":"气运之子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B0%94%E8%BF%90%E4%B9%8B%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774316728BBFF3352%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227528068821725561625%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227296034382702185507%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B0%94%E8%BF%90%E4%B9%8B%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":113,"s":110,"text":"副作用","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%89%AF%E4%BD%9C%E7%94%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774316728BBFF3352%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227528068821725561625%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227296034382702185507%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%89%AF%E4%BD%9C%E7%94%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752771376,"group_id":"7296034382702185507","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"它没想好怎么介绍自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/+mXqBubagrnzo4QPGjcL19DFSfhz2P4Yg8y2abH0uu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/930b8267ba69453fad5ae4f3a992bf41~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882422&x-signature=eyNY1%2BUFxtP5SOuKH29inHENRko%3D","user_id":"3226435961259754","user_name":"用户32264359"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3226435961259754","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296034382702185507","book_info":{"abstract":"【大佬＋扮演＋马甲＋惊悚灵异＋迪化＋气运之子+无CP】
三合一，三种惊悚类型【惊悚致郁游戏＋克苏鲁直播＋现实灵异道术】

身为n线小演员的萧归安死了，但没完全死。
他被选为扮演惊悚灵异世界中的NPC。
成为了鬼的萧归安以为能够不用害怕了。
谁料惊悚灵异世界里的主角一个比一个勇猛，切鬼如切菜，将残暴疯批二字贯彻到底，想办法在这些气运狠人手中活下来才是头等大事。
于是萧归安在与鬼和人之间使劲周旋，提升位格靠什么?靠演技！稳定san值靠什么?靠演技！
最终在萧归安的倾情演绎之下，不知不觉竟然混成了人鬼两方真正的大佬，被气运之子当成了可以抱大腿的金手指，在每天打着3份工的劳模道路上一去不复返。
萧归安：明明是鬼的我每天却在艰难求生是怎么回事?

本文又名：《保护鬼怪NPC身心健康从我做起》《王牌鬼演员的诞生》，《当好NPC金手指的一百种方法》，《为何当代气运之子一个比一个凶残》，《明明是鬼的我明天只能看着同类被杀》。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a38970d1febc49d85a130383dfef07e0","author":"诺以浈","author_id":"","book_id":"7296034382702185507","book_name":"别看我像金手指，我真只是NPC","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7296034773301428736","read_count":"72623","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1258069"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"469","tags":"悬疑脑洞,直播,灵异,无女主,大佬,惊悚游戏,克苏鲁,无后宫,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df082f2b147019952b2fa745fd3fdd2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500
